sections.heading: These Regulations may be cited as the National Pension Title
In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise re- DefinatiOns
sections.text:
quires..:....
earnings " means any benefit given by an employer in
exchange for the employee's service whether explicit or
implied, oral or in writing and may be paid in kind.
cash.credit or securities including any allowance paid by
the employer to the employee with regard to the cost of
living and any payment of wages by way of severance
benefit upon termination of employment whether the
payment is at fixed or determinable intervals of time or
calculated in relation to set tasks or with regard to the
number of tasks completed by the employee, or in relation
to the volume of work completed by the employee;
"pensionable earnings" means the earnings on which contri-.
butions to the Authority are levied and where a member's
earnings exceed the minimum threshold as set _out in the
Fifth Schedule to these Regulations, pensionable earnings
are all the earnings in a given month that are less than 'the
.. soc_ ial security ceiling: and
В·" social security ceiling" means the lowest level of earnings
on which no contribution to the Scheme is levied.
